project_type: TypeScript monorepo - Quant Live voice assistant package
build_system: pnpm workspace with tsc for compilation
test_framework: vitest with describe/it/expect patterns, vi.fn() for mocking
verification_instructions: 1. Run `npx tsc --noEmit` in packages/quant-live to check types. 2. Run `npx vitest run` in packages/quant-live to run all tests.
contribution_requirements: <=500 LOC per PR, all gates must pass, specific commit message format
key_patterns: Interface-based design (see ASRProvider, TTSProvider, LiveLLMProvider). Types in central src/types.ts. Classes exported from src/index.ts. Tests in src/__tests__/ using vitest. PrivacyAudit class is the best pattern to follow for audit trail (frozen events, query with filters, exportJSON). SessionManager pattern for entity management (Map-based storage, ID generation). TranscriptManager for segment management.
directory_structure: packages/quant-live/src/ contains subdirs: asr/, capture/, conversation/, core/, grounding/, llm/, privacy/, tts/, wake-word/. Tests in src/__tests__/. Types in src/types.ts. Exports from src/index.ts.
